title: Extract a duplicated helper into util.mjs

grade.command: node -e "Promise.all([import('./a.mjs'),import('./b.mjs'),import('./util.mjs')]).then(([a,b,u])=>{if(a.clampA(99)!==10)throw new Error('a');if(b.clampB(99)!==99)throw new Error('b');if(u.clamp(5,0,3)!==3)throw new Error('u');console.log('ok')})"

input.content: export const clamp = (v, lo, hi) => Math.min(hi, Math.max(lo, v));
